reviews.comment:
Un lugar execelente para hacer una parada, sobre todo de mañana, gran variedad de tortas. Siempre funcionan todos los servicios y los baños están en excelente estados. Siempre q viajo a Buenos Aires es mí parada.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent place to stop, especially in the morning. It offers a wide variety of sandwiches. All the restrooms are always open, and the restrooms are in excellent condition. This is my go-to stop whenever I travel to Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3anVQZWdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar estratégico para parar por su ubicación, bajó mucho la calidad de la comida y limpieza del bar

(Translated by Google)
Strategic place to stop due to its location, the quality of the food and cleanliness of the bar dropped significantly.
